mano_cua.result_summary: ProTable组件大小切换(large/default/small)功能正常，表格和分页器均随全局大小设置正常切换，浏览器控制台无JS报错。仅有轻微视觉问题：大型模式下用户状态列出现竖线字符、Expand列标题换行
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Component size switching works correctly for all 3 modes. Table and pagination respond normally. Browser console has no JS errors or warnings. Minor visual issues in large mode only.
